title: avenella flexuosa subsp. ligulata
intro: Avenella flexuosa subsp. ligulata, also known as Ligula-sedge or Ligule sedge, is a type of plant that belongs to the genus Avenella and is closely related to the genus Carex. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Avenella flexuosa subsp. ligulata include its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, which help to relieve congestion and reduce inflammation in the body. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions and decoctions, which can be made by steeping the roots and leaves in hot water to create a soothing tea.
